slides.title: Credential Deduplication System
slides.summary: Developed Full-stack Automation system using PostgreSQL upsert mechanism, reducing redundant record creation.

slides.title: SOC Alert Monitoring Dashboard
slides.summary: Aggregated security alerts from CrowdStrike API to a central dashboard with custom Node.js logic.

slides.title: Automated Task Notification System
slides.summary: Built an automated daily task tracking system to fetch pending tasks via REST API and send Slack alerts.
